beats.action: Black ash falls like snow. Below, the iron gate of the strongman's compound hangs from a single hinge, surrounded by motionless bodies.
beats.camera: Wide shot, slow pan across the destroyed gate and bodies.

beats.action: Renna stands on the ridge, looking down at the compound, whispering tensely.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Renna, looking down.

dialogue.text: They're tearing themselves to pieces down there. You didn't even have to lift a finger.

beats.action: Kaelen stands on the ridge, his gaze fixed on the burning warehouses below. Firelight flickers across his face.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, firelight flickering on his face.

beats.action: Kaelen speaks, his voice measured and cold, still watching the fires below.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's face, firelight still flickering.

dialogue.text: A hierarchy built on leverage collapses the moment the leverage is redistributed. I merely altered their calculations.

beats.action: Renna turns slightly towards Kaelen, a bitter, sarcastic expression on her face.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Renna, slight shift in her gaze.

dialogue.text: Right. By convincing his lieutenants he was going to purge them. They did your dirty work for you.

beats.action: In the courtyard below, the strongman stumbles out of his quarters, clutching a bleeding chest wound.
beats.camera: Medium shot, low angle, showing the strongman emerging from his quarters.

beats.action: The strongman looks up towards the ridge, screaming curses into the dark.
beats.camera: Close-up on the strongman's face, screaming upwards.

beats.action: The strongman collapses into the ash, motionless.
beats.camera: Medium shot, overhead, showing the strongman falling into the ash.

beats.action: Kaelen turns slightly, his expression precise and focused, giving instructions.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, slight turn towards Renna.

dialogue.text: The vacuum is temporary. We must secure the distribution vaults before the neighboring districts realize the seat is empty.

beats.action: Renna looks at Kaelen with apprehension, searching his eyes for a reaction.
beats.camera: Close-up on Renna's face, eyes darting to Kaelen's.

dialogue.text: And once we do? You think the others are just going to let you keep it? You've put a target on both our backs.

beats.action: Kaelen's face remains flat and absolute as he issues his final orders.

dialogue.text: Let them look. Attention is merely another variable to be managed. Gather the keyholders who survived. They report to me now.

beats.action: Renna hesitates, looking down at the dead strongman's body below.
beats.camera: Medium shot, Renna's profile, looking down.

beats.action: Renna looks from the dead strongman to the silent, imposing figure of Kaelen.
beats.camera: Medium close-up, Renna's gaze shifts from off-screen (strongman) to Kaelen.

beats.action: Renna nods slowly, stepping slightly closer, into the metaphorical shadow Kaelen casts over the district.
beats.camera: Medium shot of Renna nodding, then a slight pull back to emphasize Kaelen's imposing presence.
